title: SEVERE: AQI 312 in Delhi
message: Air Quality Index has reached severe levels (312) in Connaught Place. Immediate action required. CPCB emergency protocol activated.

title: High AQI Alert: Korba Power Hub
message: AQI level 298 recorded at Korba Power Hub area. Industrial emissions contributing significantly. Category: Very Poor.

title: Yamuna River: Critical Pollution
message: BOD levels 285 mg/L detected in Yamuna River at Delhi, far exceeding the 20 mg/L standard. Industrial discharge suspected.

title: pH Anomaly: Hasdeo River
message: pH 6.1 detected in Hasdeo River near Korba — below safe range. Possible acid mine drainage detected.

title: Noise Violation: Delhi Commercial Zone
message: Noise levels 89.4 dB recorded in Chandni Chowk commercial zone, exceeding 65 dB limit by 37%.

title: Bilaspur NTPC: Elevated Emissions
message: PM10 levels at 168.4 μg/m³ near NTPC plant — above the 100 μg/m³ standard. Monitoring intensified.

title: Non-Compliance: 3 Textile Units
message: Three textile manufacturing units in Durg district have failed to submit monthly compliance reports. Show-cause notices issued.

title: Mula-Mutha River: BOD Elevated
message: BOD levels (38.4 mg/L) exceeding permissible limit of 20 mg/L in Mula-Mutha River. Pune industrial zone discharge suspected.

title: Mumbai AQI Moderate Advisory
message: AQI 178 in Dharavi area — in Poor category. Residents with respiratory conditions advised to limit outdoor activity.

title: Missing Monthly Report: Chemical Plants
message: Two chemical plants in Korba district have not submitted air quality monitoring data for October 2025.
